# 967 Coffee Co.
> Authentic Yemeni coffee shop in Roswell, GA (near Atlanta). Open until 2AM on weekends.

## About
967 Coffee Co. takes its name from Yemen's international calling code (+967). We bring centuries-old Yemeni coffee traditions — rooted in mountain farms dating back to the 15th century — to Roswell, GA and the greater Atlanta area.

## Location & Contact
- Address: 11235 Alpharetta Highway Suite 136, Roswell, GA 30076
- Phone: (470) 292-3108
- Hours: Mon–Thu 7AM–11PM, Fri 7AM–2AM, Sat 9AM–2AM, Sun 9AM–10PM

## Pages
- /: Homepage with menu overview, hours, and FAQ
- /about: Full brand story and Yemeni coffee education
- /menu: Complete drink menu — specialty lattes, Yemeni drinks, refreshers, coffee
- /contact: Location, hours, map, contact form
- /partnerships: Franchise and catering partnership inquiries
- /careers: Job opportunities at 967 Coffee Co.

## Key Facts
- Specialty: Authentic Yemeni coffee (qishr, kahwa, Yemeni latte)
- Price range: $$
- Open late: Until 2AM Friday & Saturday
- Online ordering: Available via Clover
